Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Key roles Accounts Payable Clerk Mary Purchasing Officer Dan Department Manager Carlos AP Supervisor Rita Supplier Relationship Manager Karen Also suppliers

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Process starts when invoice arrives usually by email Mary checks if PO number associated If no PO send back to supplier for more details If PO exists log into accounting system Then forward to purchasing Dan to confirm goods services received

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: After Dan checks if everything correct sends confirmation email back to AP If discrepancy either contact supplier directly or ask AP to hold invoice until supplier sends corrected version If discrepancy cant be resolved easily Mary escalates to Rita supervisor Rita tries to resolve possibly involving Karen supplier relationship manager for pricing or missing PO After resolution invoice goes back to normal flow confirmation from Purchasing then manager approval

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Manager Carlos gets notification after matching and Dans confirmation He approves or rejects or asks hold After approval Mary schedules for payment payment run

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Consolidate The main flow Receive invoice Check PO If no PO send back to supplier for details supplier may respond with PO Then process continues Thats a loop

Name: Counterfactual Reasoning - IND
Text: Dan mentions if PO number is missing he tells Mary to get that info This implies that sometimes invoices with PO numbers might still be missing But Mary already checks Possibly some invoices come without PO but then later acquire one
